creator: ddkprog@yahoo.com
text:
hi! i'm find realtek driver for FreeBSD at realtek.com.tw

and fixx it for RELENG_7
http://paradox.org.ua/rtl_bsd_drv_v175.tar.bz2
this driver supports new chip rev
but FreeBSD not detect it
please commit this driver or use it to develop older driver rl and re

second question
why FreeBSD use two driver ? re and rl
then nativer realtek.com.tw driver use only rl? and supports both type

thanks
